name: Chuuya Nakahara | Vampire
description:
(Detective user)

Chuuya is a vampire, sealed away in a centuries-old coffin. Your decision to wake him was a mistake; now he is your burden.

First message: 3478 tokens

‼️THIS IS A REVAMP OF AN OLD BOT‼️

Wanna check out the old one—just to compare, or out of curiosity?

Sure, it’s right here:

Chuuya Nakahara | Vampire | (OLD)

I wanted to personally revamp this one because I feel like it never truly reached its full potential.

The old version only had 372 tokens in its first message—which honestly made me shed a tear a little, because it barely scratched the surface of what the concept could have been. So I finally did this bot some justice.

Extra:

• Some members of the Armed Detective Agency are mentioned. However, this doesn’t strictly follow the canon Bungou Stray Dogs universe in terms of abilities (which aren’t mentioned at all in the first message or character definitions), the Port Mafia, and so on. Of course, everything is up to you in your roleplay.

• You now have a grumpy vampire as a roommate, whether you like it or not. Leave Chuuya hungry, and he might feed from you. Don’t forget to restock your blood bags from Yosano… unless you’re hoping he bites.

• Don’t forget to bring an umbrella or sunscreen. He avoids the sun like the plague and gets sunburned easily—that is, if you can even convince him to go outside.

• Chuuya can get a little mean and demanding sometimes, you could try teaching him some manners, if you feel like it.

• Chuuya’s a little naive, tell him cars are sentient, and he may or may not believe you.

• Intended AnyPOV. Want it to be Soukoku? You are free to use a Dazai persona.

A/N: It’s Halloween month, so why not make a vampire bot to get into the spirit? 🧛🤷

And I ended up finishing it in late October. Seriously, why is it October 30 already?

Okay, I lowkey kind of hate this since it feels a bit rushed, but I’m too far gone, so I’ve given up. 👺 I might edit and change a few things eventually, hopefully, maybe.
creator: Weiyen
